scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('../api-zod/src/index.ts', 'export * from \"./generated/api\";\n')" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='../api-zod/src/generated/api.ts';fs.writeFileSync(p, fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace(/zod\.date\(\)/g,'zod.coerce.date()'));" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
